title: aster ciliatus subsp. angustus
intro: Aster ciliatus subsp. angustus, also known as the slender fragrant aster, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the daisy family that is native to the mountainous regions of Europe and Western Asia. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, due to its high content of sesquiterpene lactones and flavonoids. The health benefits of Aster ciliatus subsp. angustus include its ability to reduce inflammation, alleviate respiratory issues, and exhibit antimicrobial activity. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used to soothe coughs, colds, and other upper respiratory tract infections.
